title: Jack and the Beanstalk (The Giant)
summary: The famous giant's roar - booming, deep, theatrical voice.
prompt: FEE-FI-FO-FUM! I smell the blood of a curious one! Be he hiding, be he still, I will find him on my hill! The giant stomped through his great hall, and every footfall shook the rafters. Above the clouds the air was thin and cold, but the giant's roar was warmer than any furnace. "Wife," he called, "set the table! I have a most particular hunger tonight."
